sentences.text: Thank you for calling C W S Capital Partners. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a dial by name company directory press one to leave a message and the company voice mailbox press zero. Please spell the name of the person first name first press seven for Q and nine for Z to cancel the current operation press Star. Press one four. Extension seven six five for press two for. Extension six nine one six press three for Amber hide to cancel and enter a different name press Star. Press one for. Please hold while I transfer your call. Marty on pin Oak Park. Please leave a message at the tone when finished you may hang up or press pound for additional options.

conversation.title: Call: Dither  Castro  and Amber Graff @ CWS Apartment Homes
